cards.title: India's MoEngage Deploys AI Agents for Customer Marketing
cards.body: MoEngage secured an all-cash deal providing access to technology that assigns individual AI agents to customers. The platform leverages AI for personalized marketing at scale.

cards.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Tag for Slack Integration
cards.body: Anthropic's Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate directly to Slack. The feature captures organizational context and institutional knowledge for enterprise workflows.

cards.title: Fika Jobs Raises $4M for AI Video Hiring
cards.body: Stockholm-based Fika Jobs combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles. The platform merges LinkedIn-style functionality with TikTok-like video content for recruitment.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Open Source Bug Patching Initiative
cards.body: OpenAI is deploying AI to help the open source community identify and patch vulnerabilities. The initiative strengthens cybersecurity across open source projects.

cards.title: Agentic AI Enters 'Loopy' Continuous Automation Era
cards.body: Loopy enables swarms of agents to work continuously in the background endlessly. The advancement takes agentic AI capabilities beyond discrete task execution.

cards.title: Groq Confirms $650M Raise, Rebuilds Executive Team
cards.body: AI chipmaker Groq raised $650M and is restaffing leadership after Nvidia's $20B deal. The company is doubling down on its neocloud business strategy.

cards.title: Google DeepMind Invests $75M in A24 AI Filmmaking
cards.body: Google DeepMind and A24 partnered to build AI filmmaking tools. The collaboration targets Hollywood's adoption of AI-powered creative production.

cards.title: Amazon Tests Alexa+ in India with Hindi Support
cards.body: Amazon is expanding its Alexa+ conversational AI assistant to India with Hindi-language support. The rollout marks a key step in regional AI adoption.

cards.title: SpaceX Inks $150M Monthly Compute Deal for AI
cards.body: Reflection AI will pay SpaceX $150M monthly from July 2026-2029 for Nvidia GB300 chips. The deal provides immediate access to cutting-edge AI compute infrastructure.

cards.title: Apple Unveils Practical AI Features Beyond Siri
cards.body: iOS 27 introduces useful AI capabilities across the system beyond Siri's overhaul. Apple is embedding AI throughout the user experience.

cards.title: Signal Leader Warns AI Chatbots Are Not Friends
cards.body: Meredith Whittaker emphasizes that AI chatbots lack consciousness and sentience. The warning addresses misconceptions about AI assistant relationships.

cards.title: Nobel Laureate Jumper Leaves DeepMind for Anthropic
cards.body: John Jumper, Nobel laureate, is departing Google DeepMind for rival Anthropic. The move reflects ongoing executive shifts in the AI industry.

cards.title: Export Controls on AI Cybersecurity Models Face Questions
cards.body: Historical export controls on cybersecurity software have proven ineffective over 30 years. Questions arise about restricting Anthropic's Mythos model under similar frameworks.

cards.title: India's MoEngage bets on AI agents for marketing
cards.body: MoEngage secured an all-cash deal giving it access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers. The acquisition positions the company at the forefront of personalized AI-driven marketing.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Tag integrates AI into Slack
cards.body: Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate directly to Slack, capturing organizational context and institutional knowledge. This strategic move positions Anthropic deeper into enterprise workflows.

cards.title: Fika Jobs raises $4M for AI interview agents
cards.body: The Stockholm startup is building a video-first hiring platform combining AI interview agents with short-form video profiles. It blends LinkedIn and TikTok functionality to streamline candidate evaluation.

cards.title: OpenAI launches open source bug patching initiative
cards.body: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community identify and patch vulnerabilities. The initiative strengthens security across shared codebases.

cards.title: Agentic AI enters 'loopy' continuous background mode
cards.body: The latest evolution authorizes swarms of AI agents to work endlessly in the background without manual intervention. This pushes agentic AI capabilities to new autonomous levels.

cards.title: Groq raises $650M after Nvidia not-acqui-hire deal
cards.body: The AI chipmaker secured funding and is pivoting toward its neocloud business after Nvidia's $20B not-acqui-hire. Groq is simultaneously hiring new executives to lead expansion.

cards.title: Google DeepMind invests $75M in AI filmmaking tools
cards.body: DeepMind and A24 partnered to develop AI-powered filmmaking technology. The deal signals major tech investment in creative AI applications.

cards.title: Amazon tests Alexa+ with Hindi language support
cards.body: Amazon is expanding its conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India with Hindi-language capabilities. The rollout represents global expansion of next-generation voice AI.

cards.title: SpaceX compute deal powers Reflection AI research
cards.body: Reflection AI will pay $150M monthly through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's GB300 AI chips at SpaceX's Memphis data center. The massive deal funds cutting-edge open source AI research.

cards.title: Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic
cards.body: The administration announced moves against Anthropic, sparking debate about AI ecosystem consequences. The crackdown raises questions about AI governance and competition.

cards.title: Apple brings AI features across iOS 27 ecosystem
cards.body: Beyond Siri's overhaul, iOS 27 introduces practical AI capabilities throughout the system. Apple's layered approach distributes intelligence across device features.

cards.title: Signal's Whittaker warns AI chatbots aren't friends
cards.body: Signal president Meredith Whittaker cautioned users about anthropomorphizing AI chatbots as conscious beings. The warning addresses growing emotional attachment to language models.

cards.title: Nobel laureate Jumper leaves DeepMind for Anthropic
cards.body: John Jumper, a Nobel laureate, departed Google DeepMind to join rival Anthropic. The move reflects ongoing talent migration in competitive AI research.

cards.title: Export controls fail to stop AI cybersecurity model
cards.body: Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model faces export restrictions, but history suggests such controls remain ineffective. Decades of failed export controls on security software inform skepticism.

cards.title: Oracle's 21,000 layoffs fuel AI investment debt
cards.body: Oracle's massive workforce reduction finances debt-fueled AI infrastructure investments. The layoffs reflect corporate restructuring to prioritize artificial intelligence.
